div.head: 284. Editorial Note
div.p: The North Atlantic Council met on October 29 for further discussions on Cyprus. The Greek Permanent Representative announced that his government would not participate in a NATO-sponsored conference on Cyprus. The Council members agreed to the declassification of documentation relating to the efforts of NAC to convene a conference on Cyprus in order that it could be released for the information of their respective parliamentary bodies. Polto 1154, October 29, reported on the meeting. (Department of State, Central Files, 747C.00/10–2958) For text of the Greek Government’s statement, see The Cyprus Question, pages 14–17.
